payload.main_subject: Separation Agreement between Enron Corp. and Portland General Electric Company

relationships.evidence: SEPARATION AGREEMENT BETWEEN ENRON CORP. AND PORTLAND GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY

extracted_fields.name: governing_law
extracted_fields.evidence: governed by and construed in accordance with ... the internal laws of the State of Texas

extracted_fields.name: jurisdiction
extracted_fields.evidence: Bankruptcy Court shall retain exclusive jurisdiction ... Southern District of New York

extracted_fields.name: notice_period
extracted_fields.evidence: at least ninety (90) days' prior notice

extracted_fields.name: tax_allocation_agreement_termination
extracted_fields.evidence: The Tax Allocation Agreement is hereby terminated effective as of the date hereof

risks.impact: May trigger legal or regulatory penalties
risks.evidence: disclosure of which would cause the Enron Group or the PGE Group ... to breach a confidentiality obligation

risks.description: Expiration of retention period without proper notice
risks.impact: Failure to provide notice could result in unlawful disposal of records
risks.due_date: at least ninety (90) days' prior notice
risks.evidence: After the expiration of any applicable retention period, before any party shall dispose of any of such records, at least ninety (90) days' prior notice ... shall be given

risks.description: Waiver of jury trial limits legal recourse
risks.impact: Parties cannot pursue jury trial for disputes arising under the agreement
risks.evidence: THE PARTIES HEREBY IRREVOCABLY AND UNCONDITIONALLY WAIVE ... ANY RIGHT THAT THEY MAY HAVE TO TRIAL BY JURY

action_items.owner: Enron Corp.; Portland General Electric Company
action_items.due_date: seven (7) years from April 3, 2006 or until closing of Bankruptcy Cases
action_items.evidence: Each of Enron and PGE shall preserve and keep in its possession all records ... until the earlier of (x) seven (7) years from the date of this Agreement or (y) the closing of the Bankruptcy Cases

action_items.owner: Enron Corp.; Portland General Electric Company
action_items.evidence: each of Enron and PGE shall, and shall cause each of its Subsidiaries to, provide the other party with notice of any governmental inquiries or investigations ... which may relate to the business, assets or operations

action_items.owner: Enron Corp.; Portland General Electric Company
action_items.due_date: Concurrently with the execution and delivery of this Agreement, Enron is delivering
action_items.evidence: Concurrently with the execution and delivery of this Agreement, Enron is delivering ... Documents Delivered by the Enron Group; PGE is delivering ... Documents to Be Delivered by PGE

action_items.description: Amend organizational documents to remove names
action_items.evidence: PGE shall, to the extent applicable, amend its organizational documents ... to remove the "Enron" name ... within three hundred sixty five (365) days thereafter

action_items.owner: Enron Corp.; Portland General Electric Company
action_items.evidence: Immediately prior to the execution and delivery of this Agreement, PGE has caused any amounts owed ... to be released, divided or otherwise distributed to Enron ... this Agreement constitutes a full release thereof

action_items.description: Cancel and issue shares in Stock Issuance
action_items.evidence: PGE is canceling all shares of PGE Common Stock heretofore owned by Enron ... issuing the New PGE Common Stock to Stephen Forbes Cooper LLC and to other Persons pursuant to the Plan

action_items.description: Provide written notice of governmental requests
action_items.owner: Enron Corp.; Portland General Electric Company
action_items.evidence: the Person receiving such request or demand shall use all reasonable efforts to provide the other party with written notice of such request or demand as promptly as practicable
